reason: Personal-project V1 scope. The 3-copy single-blade fabrication-noise CV measurement is deferred. V1 substitutes a cheaper one-design duplicate-print sanity check at Phase 6 time.
v1_substitute: Print one V1 top-candidate twice (same design, same printer, same settings) as a same-design sanity check at Phase 6. If the two prints feel meaningfully different, the print-noise floor is wider than the V1 design gain target and the comparison is contaminated. No formal CV computation; pass/fail by feel.
revisit_trigger: V2 scope. When V1 quantitative metrics matter (kitchen scale or anemometer), the 3-copy CV gates whether sub-15% deltas are real. Re-run with the original protocol once a quantitative baseline exists.
